name: Mistango River Resources Inc.
description: Stardust Metal Corp., formerly known as Mistango River Resources Inc., is a Canadian-based exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of gold and copper assets. The company holds a diverse portfolio of projects located in the Kirkland Lake and Shebandowan gold districts of Ontario, as well as copper assets in Chibougamau, Quebec. Additionally, Stardust maintains a portfolio of strategic investments, including interests in historical production sites like the Manibridge Nickel Mine. The company is committed to advancing its mineral properties through systematic exploration and resource definition to drive long-term growth for its shareholders.
